privileged_info_summary: The task uses synthetic test data: three complaint cases created via ArkCase REST API at runtime. Case 1 is 'Environmental Impact Assessment - Project Alpha' (High priority), Case 2 is 'Budget Oversight Inquiry - Q3 2024' (Medium priority), and Case 3 is 'Vendor Contract Dispute - Cleaning Services' (Low priority). The agent must read case numbers from /home/ga/priority_audit_list.txt, look up each case in the local ArkCase instance (https://localhost:9443/arkcase), and output a CSV to /home/ga/priority_report.csv with columns: Case Number, Title, Priority. The verifier performs fuzzy string matching on titles and case-insensitive matching on priorities. Test credentials: arkcase-admin@dev.arkcase.com / ArkCase1234!
